creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Race condition

PHP 8.2 Alpha added to tree June
Now Beta2

IGNORE 8.2 added to ports after 2022Q3 branching

Most major PHP apps are incompatible with the next version of PHP and need > 6 months to catch up. That's what I experience for Nextcloud, Roundcube, phpMyAdmin, Mediawiki.

I don't think we should be building non-release FLAVORS for quarterly at all.
